benchmark_metadata.methodology: Scientific random sampling with brutal honesty
benchmark_metadata.analysis_framework: Evidence-based complexity scoring vs CLAUDE.md standards

executive_summary.savage_summary: These commands are complexity monsters that would make enterprise architects weep. They violate their own framework while claiming intelligence.

failure_modes: Will fail if Basic Memory unavailable
adhd-morning-assistant.md.savage_verdict: A 300-line monster that violates every simplicity rule while providing zero error handling. It's not intelligent - it's a broken template engine.

failure_modes: No validation of generated command syntax
generate-thinking-command.md.savage_verdict: Actually follows the thinking patterns. One of the few that doesn't completely ignore its own framework.

failure_modes: No memory management for large sessions
intelligent-refactor-session.md.savage_verdict: A 534-line monument to over-engineering. Claims "intelligent" but can't handle basic error cases. The thinking blocks have more content than most complete applications.

adhd-context-switch.md.error_handling: Assumes git, assumes Basic Memory works
adhd-context-switch.md.savage_verdict: Nearly 400 lines to save context, but zero lines to handle when the save fails. ADHD needs reliability, not more complexity.

adhd-evening-reflect.md.error_handling: Prompts for input with no validation
failure_modes: User input required but not validated
adhd-evening-reflect.md.savage_verdict: Asks for user input 15+ times with zero validation. A reflection tool that will crash when users reflect honestly with unexpected data.

evidence_backed_conclusions: 4/5 commands (80%) violate the complexity score < 5 rule from CLAUDE.md
Total estimated tokens: 86,000 - enough to write a novel
Error handling: Virtually nonexistent across all commands
Parameterization: Mostly hardcoded templates masquerading as intelligent commands

savage_but_fair_judgment.verdict: SYSTEMATIC FAILURE TO FOLLOW OWN PRINCIPLES

immediate: Archive commands with complexity >5 until fixed
Implement error handling in ALL commands
strategic: Build command linter based on CLAUDE.md rules

roi_analysis.current_state: Negative ROI - commands likely to fail in production
roi_analysis.maintenance_burden: Extreme - complex commands hard to debug
